name: bash
description: Run a shell command on the host after approval.

name: write
description: Write a file after approval.

name: edit
description: Replace text in a file after approval.

name: memory.add
description: Save a durable long-term memory.

name: memory.search
description: Search Spectre's long-term memory.

name: memory.delete
description: Delete an incorrect memory.

name: note.add
description: Save a free-form note — a thought, idea, or observation the user dictated.

name: note.list
description: List the user's notes and/or todos, with optional kind/text filters.

name: note.delete
description: Permanently delete a note or todo by id.

name: todo.add
description: Save a structured todo with optional deadline and priority.

name: todo.complete
description: Mark a todo as done.

name: notify
description: Send a push notification.

name: screenshot
description: Capture a screenshot of a web page and return an embeddable /generated image URL.

name: media.search
description: Search past screenshots and generated images by description and return embeddable URLs.

name: calendar.today
description: Read today's Microsoft 365 calendar events.

name: calendar.upcoming
description: Read upcoming Microsoft 365 calendar events.

name: mail.list
description: List or search recent email across all connected Microsoft + Google accounts.

name: mail.read
description: Read one full email by account_id + id (from mail.list).

name: setup.status
description: Show which integrations/connectors are connected.

name: setup.add_cli
description: Register any command as a new model brain (custom CLI) after approval.

name: setup.save_secret
description: Save a token/credential into the right connector after approval.

name: analytics.usage
description: Inspect model usage and estimated cost.

name: questionnaire.ask
description: Ask the user an embedded structured questionnaire and wait for answers.

name: schedule.create
description: Create a durable scheduled job.

name: schedule.list
description: List durable scheduled jobs.

name: schedule.get
description: Get one durable scheduled job.

name: schedule.update
description: Update a durable scheduled job after approval.

name: schedule.run_now
description: Make a schedule due immediately after approval.

name: schedule.delete
description: Delete a schedule after approval.

name: categories.list
description: List chat categories (id, name, description, color).

name: categories.create
description: Create a chat category after approval.

name: categories.update
description: Update a chat category's name/description/color after approval.

name: categories.delete
description: Delete a chat category (its chats fall back to Uncategorized) after approval.

name: chats.list
description: List chats, optionally filtered by category and archived state.

name: chats.move
description: Move a chat into or out of a category after approval.

name: chats.distill
description: Distill a chat into long-term memory then permanently delete it, after approval.

name: skill.read
description: Load the full instructions of a skill listed in the skill index.

name: tempus.timer.status
description: Show the currently running Tempus timer, if any.

name: tempus.timer.start
description: Start a Tempus timer for a project with an optional description.

projectId.description: Tempus project id to track against.

description.description: Optional work description for the timer.

name: tempus.timer.stop
description: Stop the active Tempus timer and save the resulting time entry.

name: tempus.entries.today
description: List today's completed Tempus time entries.

name: tempus.entries.search
description: Search completed Tempus time entries by date range, project, and text.

q.description: Filter by description, project name, or tag text.

name: tempus.projects.list
description: List active Tempus projects with their tracked totals.

name: tempus.reports.daily
description: Summarize Tempus tracked time for one calendar day.

date.description: Date to report as YYYY-MM-DD; defaults to today.

name: tempus.reports.weekly
description: Summarize Tempus tracked time for one ISO-style Monday-start week.

week.description: Week as YYYY-Www or any date inside the week; defaults to this week.

name: dispatch_to_model
description: Spectre Mode only: dispatch a self-contained text/reasoning sub-task to a specialist model.

name: gemini.execute
description: Delegate a text task to the Gemini CLI.

name: openai.image
description: Generate an image via Codex/OpenAI image_gen and return a /generated URL.

name: openai.chat
description: Delegate a text task to a GPT model through Codex CLI.
